preamble: The raising of the nucleus in the diphthong 'ai' often leads to the development of 'ei', frequently as part of larger vowel raising shifts.

examples.note: As part of the Great Vowel Shift, long [a:] raised to [e:] and later diphthongized into [ei].

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
